narrative:
Lakewood City has 36,403 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.4 percentage points.
